headline: Meta Begins 8,000 Global Job Cuts in Asian Hub of Singapore
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Meta Platforms Inc. is alerting thousands of employees that they’re being laid off, part of a previously announced restructuring aimed at improving efficiency and reducing costs while investing heavily in artificial intelligence.Most Read from BloombergUS Lawmakers Plan New $130 Fee for Electric Vehicle OwnersNATO Is Starting to Consider Hormuz Mission to Protect ShipsUS 30-Year Yield Hits Highest Since 2007 as Selloff DeepensHasbro Cancels Dungeons & Dragons Game From ‘Star Wars’

content.title: Meta Begins 8,000 Global Job Cuts in Asian Hub of Singapore
content.summary: (Bloomberg) -- Meta Platforms Inc. is alerting thousands of employees that they’re being laid off, part of a previously announced restructuring aimed at improving efficiency and reducing costs while investing heavily in artificial intelligence.Most Read from BloombergUS Lawmakers Plan New $130 Fee for Electric Vehicle OwnersNATO Is Starting to Consider Hormuz Mission to Protect ShipsUS 30-Year Yield Hits Highest Since 2007 as Selloff DeepensHasbro Cancels Dungeons & Dragons Game From ‘Star Wars’
